content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA consisting of NNN positive integers.

Find ∑i=1N∑j=iNF3(i,j)\sum_{i=1}^{N} \sum_{j=i}^{N} F^3(i,j)∑i=1N​∑j=iN​F3(i,j), where F(i,j)=∑k=ijAkF(i,j)=\sum_{k=i}^{j} A_kF(i,j)=∑k=ij​Ak​.

Since the value might be quite large, print it modulo 998244353998244353998244353.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN — the length of the array AAA.
The second line of each test case contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ representing the array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the answer, modulo 998244353998244353998244353.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 5⋅1055 \cdot 10^55⋅105.
